title: Slovakian Noodle Stir Fry
description: A flavorful Chinese-inspired stir fry made with Slovakian noodles and seasoned with brown rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the soy sauce and stir to coat the chicken.
Add the cooked Slovakian noodles, garlic, and ginger to the wok.
Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Add the green onions and cook for an additional minute.
Serve hot and garnish with additional green onions if desired.
Cook time for the noodles is 3-5 minutes.
Cooking temperature for the chicken is 165°F (74°C).
Allow the dish to rest for 2 minutes before serving.
